reason: Wrong items received — customer ordered two computer science books (Introduction to Algorithms + The Art of Computer Programming) but received two unrelated Spanish-language books (El Hombre en Busca de Sentido, Lazos de Amor).
summary: Customer received completely wrong books for order BK-1003 ($389.95) — got two Spanish-language titles instead of two computer science textbooks. No explicit urgency signals. Customer is a 5-year Gold loyalty member with $1,240 annual spend. Photo of incorrect items provided.
procedure: Given his loyalty status, offer an immediate replacement with 15% off, without waiting to receive the wrong items first. Include expedited shipping at no cost so the customer receives the correct books before their class. If the customer prefers a regular return instead, proceed without any pushback.
